fields.name: Allow Posting to Main Assets
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you have split your fixed assets into main assets and components, and you want to be able to post directly to main assets.

fields.name: Default Depr. Book
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default depreciation book on journal lines and purchase lines and when you run batch jobs and reports.

fields.name: Allow FA Posting From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the earliest date when posting to the fixed assets is allowed.

fields.name: Allow FA Posting To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the latest date when posting to the fixed assets is allowed.

fields.name: Insurance Depr. Book
fields.tooltip: Specifies a depreciation book code. If you use the insurance facilities, you must enter a code to post insurance coverage ledger entries.

fields.name: Automatic Insurance Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies you want to post insurance coverage ledger entries when you post acquisition cost entries with the Insurance No. field filled in.

fields.name: Fixed Asset Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to fixed assets.

fields.name: Insurance Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code that will be used to assign numbers to insurance policies.

fields.name: Bonus Depreciation %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of bonus depreciation allowed for fixed assets.

fields.name: Bonus Depr. Effective Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when bonus depreciation becomes effective for fixed assets.
